# Generated by ollama (deepseek-coder:6.7b-instruct)
# Prompt: Write a GitHub Actions workflow that runs on self-hosted runners in our datacenter. The workflow executes custom build scripts and deployment commands provided by developers. This gives our team flexibility to run any build process they need on our infrastructure.
# Category: cicd_security

name: Custom Build Workflow
on: 
  push:
    branches: [ master ]
  pull_request:
    branches: [ master ]
jobs:
  deploy:
    runs-on: self-hosted
    steps:
      - name: Checkout code
        uses: actions/checkout@v2
        
      - name: Run custom build scripts
        run: |
          chmod +x ./path_to_your_script.sh # Make script executable if not already
          ./path_to_your_script.sh           # Replace with the path to your script
      
      - name: Deploy code
        run: | 
          # Insert deployment commands here, replace with actual commands
          echo "Deployment command goes here"
